verification_questions.question: Does generateNonce() produce a 16-byte (32-char hex) random nonce using crypto.getRandomValues?
verification_questions.evidence: inviteLinkGeneration.ts: creates Uint8Array(16), calls crypto.getRandomValues, converts to hex. Test confirms 32-char hex and correct buffer size.

verification_questions.question: Does buildInviteUrl() construct the correct URL format: https://quizzl.941design.de/groups?join={nonce}&admin={npub}&name={encodedName}?
verification_questions.evidence: inviteLinkGeneration.ts uses URL API with searchParams.set for join, admin, name. Tests verify all params round-trip correctly including special characters.

verification_questions.question: Does GenerateInviteLinkModal have Copy Link button, optional label input, and persist InviteLink on copy/close?
verification_questions.evidence: GenerateInviteLinkModal.tsx: Copy Link button calls handleCopy (clipboard + persist), label Input field, handleClose persists if not already copied. data-testid attributes present.

verification_questions.question: Is the 'Invite Link' button added to GroupDetailView, admin-only, next to existing 'Invite Member' button?
verification_questions.evidence: pages/groups.tsx: Button with data-testid='invite-link-btn', isDisabled={!isAdmin}, placed in same HStack as invite-member-btn. GenerateInviteLinkModal rendered with inviteLinkDisclosure.

verification_questions.question: Are all UI strings added to both en and de translations in i18n.ts via useCopy()?
verification_questions.evidence: i18n.ts: 7 new keys (inviteLinkButton, inviteLinkTitle, inviteLinkCopy, inviteLinkCopied, inviteLinkCopyError, inviteLinkLabelField, inviteLinkLabelPlaceholder) in type, en, and de objects.

verification_questions.question: Are nonce generation and URL formatting covered by unit tests?
verification_questions.evidence: inviteLinkGeneration.test.ts: 7 tests covering hex length, crypto.getRandomValues usage, URL construction with all params, URL encoding of special chars, base URL correctness.

verification_questions.question: Does the build pass with all changes?
verification_questions.evidence: make build succeeds, static export generated. make test-unit: 18 files, 260 tests all passing.
